# services.syncoid

<!-- AUTO-GENERATED by scripts/nix-options.sh. Do not edit by hand. -->

All options under `services.syncoid`.

| Option | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `services.syncoid.commands` | `attribute set of (submodule)` | Syncoid commands to run. |
| `services.syncoid.commands.<name>.extraArgs` | `list of string` | Extra syncoid arguments for this command. |
| `services.syncoid.commands.<name>.localSourceAllow` | `list of string` | Permissions granted for the {option}`services.syncoid.user` user for local source datasets. See <https://openzfs.github.io/openzfs-docs/man/8/zfs-allow.8.html> for available permissions. Defaults to {option}`services.syncoid.localSourceAllow` option. |
| `services.syncoid.commands.<name>.localTargetAllow` | `list of string` | Permissions granted for the {option}`services.syncoid.user` user for local target datasets. See <https://openzfs.github.io/openzfs-docs/man/8/zfs-allow.8.html> for available permissions. Make sure to include the `change-key` permission if you send raw encrypted datasets, the `compression` permission if you send raw compressed datasets, and so on. For remote target datasets you'll have to set your remote user permissions by yourself. |
| `services.syncoid.commands.<name>.recursive` | `boolean` | Whether to enable the transfer of child datasets. |
| `services.syncoid.commands.<name>.recvOptions` | `strings concatenated with " "` | Advanced options to pass to zfs recv. Options are specified without their leading dashes and separated by spaces. |
| `services.syncoid.commands.<name>.sendOptions` | `strings concatenated with " "` | Advanced options to pass to zfs send. Options are specified without their leading dashes and separated by spaces. |
| `services.syncoid.commands.<name>.service` | `attribute set` | Systemd configuration specific to this syncoid service. |
| `services.syncoid.commands.<name>.source` | `string` | Source ZFS dataset. Can be either local or remote. Defaults to the attribute name. |
| `services.syncoid.commands.<name>.sshKey` | `null or (string or absolute path convertible to it)` | SSH private key file to use to login to the remote system. Defaults to {option}`services.syncoid.sshKey` option. |
| `services.syncoid.commands.<name>.target` | `string` | Target ZFS dataset. Can be either local («pool/dataset») or remote («user@server:pool/dataset»). |
| `services.syncoid.commands.<name>.useCommonArgs` | `boolean` | Whether to add the configured common arguments to this command. |
| `services.syncoid.commonArgs` | `list of string` | Arguments to add to every syncoid command, unless disabled for that command. See <https://github.com/jimsalterjrs/sanoid/#syncoid-command-line-options> for available options. |
| `services.syncoid.enable` | `boolean` | Whether to enable Syncoid ZFS synchronization service. |
| `services.syncoid.group` | `string` | The group for the service. |
| `services.syncoid.interval` | `string or list of string` | Run syncoid at this interval. The default is to run hourly. Must be in the format described in {manpage}`systemd.time(7)`. This is equivalent to adding a corresponding timer unit with {option}`OnCalendar` set to the value given here. Set to an empty list to avoid starting syncoid automatically. |
| `services.syncoid.localSourceAllow` | `list of string` | Permissions granted for the {option}`services.syncoid.user` user for local source datasets. See <https://openzfs.github.io/openzfs-docs/man/8/zfs-allow.8.html> for available permissions. |
| `services.syncoid.localTargetAllow` | `list of string` | Permissions granted for the {option}`services.syncoid.user` user for local target datasets. See <https://openzfs.github.io/openzfs-docs/man/8/zfs-allow.8.html> for available permissions. Make sure to include the `change-key` permission if you send raw encrypted datasets, the `compression` permission if you send raw compressed datasets, and so on. For remote target datasets you'll have to set your remote user permissions by yourself. |
| `services.syncoid.package` | `package` | The sanoid package to use. |
| `services.syncoid.service` | `attribute set` | Systemd configuration common to all syncoid services. |
| `services.syncoid.sshKey` | `null or (string or absolute path convertible to it)` | SSH private key file to use to login to the remote system. Can be overridden in individual commands. |
| `services.syncoid.user` | `string` | The user for the service. ZFS privilege delegation will be automatically configured for any local pools used by syncoid if this option is set to a user other than root. The user will be given the "hold" and "send" privileges on any pool that has datasets being sent and the "create", "mount", "receive", and "rollback" privileges on any pool that has datasets being received. |
